basics.name: Vitaliy Hlynianyi-Zhuk
basics.label: AI Integration Engineer · Azure Cloud · Low-code Automation · Business Analyst · Scrum Master

work.name: Epic Flooring
work.summary: Built a Missive email client CRM add-on from scratch using GitHub Copilot, enabling job tracking without context switching for a commercial flooring business.
highlights: Designed full data pipeline: ClickUp API, Google Drive, Xero, Google Sheets → Azure Functions (Python) → Supabase (PostgreSQL) → Vanilla JS frontend embedded in Missive.
Deployed on Azure Static Web Apps with GitHub Actions CI/CD; covers job status, document revisions, purchase orders, and tender tracking.

projects.name: Home Assistant Green — Smart Home
projects.description: Pet project. Self-hosted Home Assistant Green hub exposed to the internet via Cloudflare Tunnel (Zero Trust), connected to Android companion app without port forwarding. Cross-compiled PhotoRec (CGSecurity open-source file recovery utility) for Home Assistant OS (aarch64) using a temporary Azure Linux VM provisioned and scripted with GitHub Copilot.

projects.name: Telegram MCP Server on Azure
projects.description: Pet project. Forked fast-mcp-telegram, customised and deployed on Azure Linux VM, added OAuth, exposed via Cloudflare Tunnel, authored a Claude Skill to integrate the server with Claude AI.

projects.name: Voice-to-Text Transcription App
projects.description: Pet project. Android app (Flutter/Dart) built with GitHub Copilot — transcribes voice messages shared from Telegram and WhatsApp. Benchmarked all available Azure AI Foundry speech-to-text models on Russian and English speech; selected best-performing engines across Azure AI Foundry, Azure Speech Services, and ElevenLabs.
